caption: A person's hands are seen opening a white box, revealing a small yellow envelope inside. The scene is set in a room with a colorful patterned surface and a stack of sports cards in the background. On-screen, a logo for "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are visible, along with a small inset video showing a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt sitting at a desk with equipment. As the sequence progresses, the person lifts the yellow envelope out of the white box. In the final moments, the envelope is opened to reveal a sports card featuring two athletes, with the names "JETEN" and "GRIFFEY JR." printed on it. The card also contains a handwritten signature in black ink. The overall action focuses on the unveiling of this specific collectible card from the packaging.
